chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 203 of 2008 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For orders on CMA No.7259/2023 (C/A) 07.03.2024 Petitioners No.5, 26 and 44 are present in person. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Shafi Muhammad Bullo, Deputy Director (Primary) on behalf of Director School Education, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Vide order dated 16.03.2023, petitioners were allowed to appear before the Grievance Redressal Committee, which was directed to examine their qualifications, arrange special test, and if they qualify the same, they be appointed in their respected areas. In compliance of such order, the test of petitioners was conducted. Out of whom, 29 were absent, and the remaining could not qualify the test as they obtained less than 60 marks. Hence, their appointment has been regretted. On the last date of hearing, a copy of the compliance report was given to the petitioners for a perusal, who, however, disputes its contents. Be that as it may, since the substantial compliance of order dated 16.03.2023 has been made, the listed application No.7259/2023 is disposed of. However, the petitioners are at liberty, if they wish, they can challenge the aforesaid compliance report before a proper forum. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
